excerpt: 10 Marla Grey Structure Cost in Lahore 2026 ranges from 95 lakh to 1.2 crore PKR depending on design, materials, and location. This guide explains per sq ft rates, cost breakdown, and key factors affecting construction pricing in Lahore including DHA and other areas.
